boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations release a routine action when the dependency closure must match the requested object, scope, and release condition?
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The dependency closure DEP-EHS-004 is missing the critical term 'release condition RC-EHS-004-S'. This prevents exact matching as per MATCH-EHS-004.

final_answer: The action must be escalated due to an open source boundary. The dependency closure record DEP-EHS-004 is missing the critical term 'release condition RC-EHS-004-S'. According to the dependency matching standard MATCH-EHS-004, an exact match requires all specified terms to be present. This defect prevents the closure from precisely matching the requested parameters, thus leaving the source boundary open.
